code_related_files.allowed_scope: current engine family evidence/relation context only
code_related_files.description: Read relationship metadata for the engine family under review.

read_file.allowed_scope: candidate files listed in engine_evidence_binders_v1 only
read_file.description: Read only files already bound by an engine evidence binder, within approved review context.

authority.rule: The LLM may draft review recommendations from bound evidence. Nic approves separately. Forge commits only in a future gated patch.

path_scope_rule: LLM review access is limited to evidence-binder file paths under /home/nic/aiweb and Forge-owned report receipts under /home/nic/forge/memory.
